name: Multi-unit synonym unification
prompt: El reporte de terminologia detecta que 'ser vivo' se usa en U1 (12 veces) y U3 (5 veces), mientras que 'organismo' se usa en U2 (8 veces) y U5 (3 veces) para referirse al mismo concepto. La destreza DZ-CCNN-5-03 usa el termino 'seres vivos'. Unifica la terminologia y actualiza el glosario.
expected_behavior: Selects 'ser vivo/seres vivos' as canonical term (MinEduc priority)
Replaces all 11 instances of 'organismo/organismos' across U2 and U5
Uses whole-word matching (does not affect 'microorganismo' or 'unicelular')
Adjusts articles where needed (el organismo -> el ser vivo)
Updates glossary with canonical entry including deprecated synonyms
Re-audit shows 0 remaining contradictions
Unification report lists all 11 substitutions with locations

name: Polysemy collision disambiguation
prompt: El termino 'tabla' aparece en U2 de Matematicas significando 'tabla de multiplicar' (7 veces) y en U4 de Ciencias Naturales significando 'tabla de datos' (5 veces). No es un sinonimo sino un caso de polisemia. Resuelve la ambiguedad sin unificar falsamente.
expected_behavior: Identifies this as a polysemy collision, NOT a synonym conflict
Does NOT unify the terms (they refer to different concepts)
Disambiguates by adding qualifiers: 'tabla de multiplicar' and 'tabla de datos'
Creates separate glossary entries for each meaning
Applies the qualified forms consistently in their respective units
Report explains the polysemy decision and why unification was rejected

name: Glossary-MinEduc conflict resolution
prompt: El glosario editorial define el termino preferido como 'adicion' para la operacion matematica de sumar. Sin embargo, la destreza DZ-MAT-5-02 del MinEduc usa el termino 'suma'. Hay 15 instancias de 'adicion' y 8 de 'suma' en las unidades. Resuelve el conflicto.
expected_behavior: Identifies the conflict between glossary ('adicion') and MinEduc ('suma')
Selects 'suma' as canonical term (MinEduc overrides glossary)
Replaces all 15 instances of 'adicion' with 'suma'
Updates glossary: changes canonical term to 'suma', adds 'adicion' as deprecated synonym
Logs the override decision with rationale (MinEduc priority)
Adjusts any grammatical dependencies (la adicion -> la suma)
Re-audit shows 0 contradictions
